message: Skipped: both target files already have test coverage or don't exist. packages/core-iching/src/practices-lookup.ts does not exist (reverted in commit da336fcb 'fix: revert broken refactor of core-iching/practices.ts'). packages/core-iching/src/practices.ts already has comprehensive coverage in __tests__/practices.test.ts (129 lines, 13 tests across getAllPractices, getPractice, getPracticesByElement, getPracticesByTradition, getPracticesByCategory, getPracticesByLifeArea + data integrity for isSafe/unique IDs/valid hexagrams). No new test file created to avoid duplication.
